title: Lockset finish mismatch — US26D specified, US32D delivered
description: Receiving inspection on 2026-04-10 found that the mortise locksets for openings 1315 and 1314 were shipped in US32D rather than the submittal-approved US26D. Packing slip confirms mis-pick at distributor.
notes: Distributor agreed to RMA and reship; confirming lead time.

comments.body: Called distributor rep — they confirmed mis-pick and are preparing RMA paperwork. Tracking by EOD Monday.
